description: Style Noteadidas catches the playful mood just right with these printed tees. Innovative prints and a comfortable Fit gets the Sports-casual look back in vogue. You can pair this with cotton shorts or denims for a slick look. Product DetailsBlue T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print in front, branding embroidered on the chest on the left side, back and front yoke, brand patch above the hemline in front, tab with two eyelets at the back above the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
